case_title: GAETANI REAL ESTATE VS. CAMILLA L. COLBERT ET AL

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT COLBERT, CAMILLA L.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GAETANI REAL ESTATE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLBERT, CAMILLA L. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 875 FULTON STREET, #2, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94117, SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE OF CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAETANI REAL ESTATE AS TO DEFENDANT COLBERT, CAMILLA L. DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAETANI REAL ESTATE SERVED JAN-02-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COLBERT, CAMILLA L.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAETANI REAL ESTATE SERVED JAN-02-2019, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT COLBERT, CAMILLA L. DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION RE: RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAETANI REAL ESTATE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT COLBERT, CAMILLA L.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAETANI REAL ESTATE AS TO DEFENDANT COLBERT, CAMILLA L.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE. $88.40 FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAETANI REAL ESTATE
